note: To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is [age-standardized](#dod:age_standardized).
title: Suicide rate in 1980 vs. 2023
subtitle:
Estimated aumber of suicides per 100,000 people in a given population and year. Suicide deaths are underreported in
many countries due to social stigma and cultural or legal concerns. This data is based on modeling of global suicide
patterns, and includes adjustments that aim to account for missing data and underreporting.
